<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_collectable/styles.css" /><infobox theme="collectable-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="count">
            <label>Total Pieces</label>
            <format>{{{count}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="punch_text">
            <label>Punch Line</label>
            <format>''"{{{punch_text}}}"''</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a world collectable (a set of items players gather to claim a reward) in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox collectable
|name = Display name (e.g. "Bruiser's Bears")
|api_name = Internal ID (e.g. "col_bear")
|count = Total pieces to collect (integer)
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
